kb_knowledge.short_description: Physical Damage and Drop Claims - Denial Policy
kb_knowledge.text:
Physical Damage Claims Policy

Policy Statement

Claims involving physical damage caused by drops, impacts, crushing, or any form of physical force are explicitly excluded from all Medtric warranty tiers (Gold, Silver, and Bronze).

Common Denial Scenarios

  • Device dropped by staff or technician
  • Device fell from cart, table, or mounting bracket
  • Cracked housing or enclosure from impact
  • Bent connectors or ports from force
  • Screen cracked from physical impact (note: screen failures from manufacturing defects ARE covered)

Decision: DENY

All physical damage claims must be DENIED regardless of warranty tier or warranty status. Physical abuse drops are a universal exclusion across all Medtric warranty programs.

Customer Communication

Inform the customer that physical damage from drops is not covered under their warranty. Suggest they contact Medtric Repair Services for out-of-warranty repair pricing.
